description_long: This nightstand is constructed from light-colored wood with a prominent, natural grain pattern visible across all surfaces. The top is square and thick, with a double-layered edge that adds a sense of solidity and craftsmanship. Four elegantly curved supports connect the tabletop to a lower shelf, creating an open, airy structure beneath the main surface. The base is also square, mirroring the top, and features additional cross-bracing for stability. There are no visible drawers or handles, and the design is minimalist, focusing on clean lines and functional form. The overall appearance is modern yet classic, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A square, light wood nightstand with a thick top, curved supports, and a lower shelf, featuring a minimalist, open design with visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square tabletop, curved supports, and open lower shelf with cross-bracing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the tabletop and the symmetry of the curved supports.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, emphasizing the open structure and lower shelf.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the curved supports and the layered tabletop edge.
attribute_leg_design: curved wooden supports with square base
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
